runTitle: GitLab Release Deploy Smoke - v8.12.96 landing refactor release
coveredSurfaces: GitLab semver tag release pipeline v8.12.96 completed successfully (pipeline 2581172608, commit 8b14676e2531a9ecceb4998864ed9bfd9054bc84)
Frontend production deploy job and post_deploy_smoke succeeded
Vercel production / and /login smoke passed with expected version 8.12.96
Vercel /api/version returned version 8.12.96, releaseTag v8.12.96, commitSha 8b14676e2531a9ecceb4998864ed9bfd9054bc84, pipelineUrl 2581172608
Vercel /api/health returned healthy for database, cache, and ai services
AI Engine deploy job and smoke succeeded with no runtime version bump; Cloud Run /health correctly remained version 8.12.95
Cloud Run latestReadyRevision ai-engine-00595-lk4 receives 100% traffic
Cloud Run live resource limits remained cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
Vercel usage checked after production deploy; no unexpected billed usage observed
skippedSurfaces: Full dashboard/modal/AI conversational walkthrough not repeated because the changed surface was landing copy/framing
Cloud Run AI Engine code deployment was not required; ai-engine component version intentionally kept at 8.12.95

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab semver tag pipeline completed production deploy and smoke; Vercel version/commit and health checks matched v8.12.96.
Vercel /api/version, /api/health, Cloud Run /health, revision traffic, and usage/resource guardrails were verified after deploy.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked via vercel usage; effective=2.5854 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage observed after v8.12.96 deploy.
Cloud Run ai-engine stayed within free-tier guardrails: cpu=1, memory=512Mi, latest revision ai-engine-00595-lk4 at 100% traffic.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1

artifacts.label: GitLab v8.12.96 release pipeline
artifacts.note: deploy, deploy_ai_engine skip/smoke path, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke succeeded

completedImprovements.title: Landing page AI server ops framing refactor deployed to Vercel production in v8.12.96

notes: Deployment path used canonical GitLab semver tag v8.12.96.
This release supersedes the v8.12.95 production frontend deployment because a new landing refactor commit arrived on main after v8.12.95 was deployed.
